mapper.select: SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile WHERE status != '삭제' ORDER BY seller_no DESC

SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile WHERE seller_no = #{sellerNo}
SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, status FROM seller_profile WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile
status != '삭제'
AND
company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY seller_no DESC

SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile WHERE status != '삭제' ORDER BY seller_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile
status != '삭제'
AND
company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY seller_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller_profile WHERE status != '삭제'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller_profile
status != '삭제'
AND
company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE seller_profile SET member_no = #{memberNo}, company_name = #{companyName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, biz_no = #{bizNo}, online_sale_no = #{onlineSaleNo}, tel = #{tel}, fax = #{fax}, zip = #{zip}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2}, status = #{status} WHERE seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seller_profile ( member_no, company_name, ceo_name, biz_no, online_sale_no, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{companyName}, #{ceoName}, #{bizNo}, #{onlineSaleNo}, #{tel}, #{fax}, #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, '운영준비', NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE seller_profile SET status = '삭제' WHERE seller_no IN
#{sellerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller_profile WHERE status != '삭제'

SELECT sp.seller_no AS sellerNo, sp.company_name AS companyName, sp.biz_no AS bizNo, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_no) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.payment_status = '결제완료' THEN o.order_no END) AS paymentCompleteCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = '배송중' THEN d.delivery_no END) AS deliveryIngCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = '배송완료' THEN d.delivery_no END) AS deliveryCompleteCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.item_status = '구매확정' AND o.order_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS purchaseConfirmCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_no IS NOT NULL THEN oi.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS orderTotal, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN o.payment_status = '결제완료' AND (oi.item_status IS NULL OR oi.item_status NOT IN ('취소', '반품', '환불')) THEN oi.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS salesTotal FROM seller_profile sp LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON sp.seller_no = oi.seller_no LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_no = o.order_no
AND o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND DATE(o.order_date) = CURDATE()
LEFT JOIN delivery d ON oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no WHERE sp.status != '삭제' GROUP BY sp.seller_no, sp.company_name, sp.biz_no ORDER BY salesTotal DESC, sp.seller_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
